scope.principle: cost and time assumptions are independent economic inputs, not parameters chosen to rescue or reject a named factor

cost_model.freeze_rule: a versioned cost surface is frozen before it is applied to factor returns; changing it creates a new audit version rather than rewriting the old result

horizon_model.candidate_rule: start with the source canonical horizon; allow at most one slower or lower-turnover horizon only when justified by decay and cost, never by a return grid search
horizon_model.selection_rule: IS may estimate decay; Validation decides whether the frozen horizon is useful; Holdout cannot choose a horizon
horizon_model.failure_rule: a signal whose economic half-life is shorter than executable turnover and cost is rejected even when gross backtest return is positive

frozen_90_day_low_volatility_track.future_use: after a factory-wide cost model is independently frozen, report a separately versioned re-audit without overwriting prior evidence

current_work.goal: freeze a reusable asset-notional-regime execution-cost surface and validate data proxies
